title: File:Rihanna visits U.S. Embassy in Barbados 2024.jpg
creator: U.S. Embassy Bridgetown
description: "On behalf of President Biden and the American people, it was an honor to welcome legendary artist, entrepreneur and philanthropist #Rihanna to the U.S. Embassy in Bridgetown. As a national hero, she embodied the warm, welcoming spirit I see everyday in #Barbados. Her global impact extends far beyond music, influencing culture and business as well as inspiring communities around the world. I look forward to exploring opportunities to work together and to forging connections that bring our countries closer together through music, the arts and making a difference in people’s lives." -Ambassador Nyhus 🇺🇸💎🇧🇧
